ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "bb" INTEGER /* A unique identifier for the patient within the clinical trial or study */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Brief medical history of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptoms" (
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom */,
  "symptom_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symptom */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* ICD code for the symptom */,
  "severity_scale" TEXT /* Scale used for severity assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_symptoms" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symptom */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the symptom (0-10) */,
  "observation_date" TEXT /* Date when the symptom was observed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the symptom */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment administered for the symptom */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_symptoms_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_symptoms_symptom_id FOREIGN KEY ("symptom_id") REFERENCES symptoms ("symptom_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinical trial */,
  "trial_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinical trial */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the clinical trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the clinical trial */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Current status of the trial */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Sponsor of the trial */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Primary objective of the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_patients" (
  "trial_patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between patient and trial */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clinical trial */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient was enrolled in the trial */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient withdrew from the trial, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_patients_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES clinical_trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_patients_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., principal investigator, data analyst) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data is accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptom_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symptom category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the symptom category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symptom category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symptom_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES symptom_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symptom_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "symptom_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symptom */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symptom category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symptom_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES symptom_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symptom_category_mapping_symptom_id FOREIGN KEY ("symptom_id") REFERENCES symptoms ("symptom_id")
)
column_names: A unique identifier for the patient within the clinical trial or study
Date of birth of the patient
Brief medical history of the patient
Unique identifier for each symptom record
Date when the symptom was observed
Unique identifier for each clinical trial

Date when the patient withdrew from the trial, if applicable
